startups.name: Cryptoyield-matrix
startups.description: An institutional-grade, multi-chain DeFi yield aggregator and dynamic investment strategy sandbox tracking $135B+ TVL across 87 chains. Built with an async FastAPI backend and automated data pipelines syncing 5,000+ pools into SQLite. Features interactive continuous-compounding tools, TradingView charts, and programmatic JSON-LD SEO schemas.

Bring your own LLM subscription (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini → $0/token). Data: yfinance, FRED, Allium.

startups.name: Back2u
startups.description: Back2U is a free web app that helps people in Cameroon quickly recover lost items (phones, wallets, bags, keys, etc.) by connecting them with kind finders through real-time matching, maps, secure chat, and community trust features.

startups.name: wallet-adapter-eth
startups.description: Ethereum Adapter is a concrete implementation of the Multi-Chain Wallet Adapter interface for Ethereum and EVM-compatible chains (e.g., BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum). It supports offline transaction construction, EIP-155 signing message generation, and raw transaction broadcasting — designed to work seamlessly with external MPC signing services.

startups.name: qfc-server-wallet
startups.description: QFC server wallet — TEE custody (Nitro), SSS, M-of-N quorum. Pre-M1, see docs/server-wallet-rfc.md.

startups.name: atomic
startups.description: Atomic scripts for launching, collecting fees from, and trading pump.fun coins. Built around Jito bundles for atomicity across multiple txs, useful when: You need the create tx's fee payer to differ from the wallet supplying the SOL (separate funder vs creator), The creator wallet has a public/shared private key...

startups.name: shi-intelligence

startups.name: txio
startups.description: Txio is a unified developer platform designed to eliminate the friction of multi-chain development. Instead of juggling separate tools and environments for every blockchain, Flow provides a single, high-performance interface that abstracts the complexities of different RPCs, address formats, and network types.

startups.name: how_to_make_evm_from_scratch_in_rust_by_love
startups.description: A zero-dependency, #[no_std] Ethereum Virtual Machine built from absolute zero. No crates—just Rust, mathematics, and the Yellow Paper

startups.name: MelonS-Agents
startups.description: Multi-skill AI assistant framework, agentskills.io spec compliant. Skill #1 music-video (60s 9:16 shorts, beat-aligned, genre-aware), Skill #2   job-hunt (30+ boards, LLM filter). v0.4.0 shipped. Orchestrator + 4 subagents + 3-layer reactive auditor.

startups.name: lstm-from-scratch
startups.description: Character-level 2-layer LSTM trained on Shakespeare — built in pure Python with a custom C matrix backend. No NumPy, no PyTorch, no frameworks.

startups.name: openENOC
startups.description: openENOC is an open-source Ethernet-based NoC for scalable MPSoC systems, using Layer-2 packet switching to connect CPUs, accelerators and peripherals for crypto, AI and edge computing.

startups.name: ai-soc-platform
startups.description: Distributed AI-augmented SOC across 3 Windows hosts + 1 Linux NIDS sensor. Wazuh SIEM, TheHive/Cortex/Shuffle SOAR, 8-microservice AI layer (ML + RAG + local LLM via Ollama). Adapted from OnyxLab AI_SOC (Apache 2.0).

startups.name: auth-go
startups.description: Shareable Go OAuth 2.0 client library for CLIs: RFC 8628 device flow, RFC 8693 token exchange, token storage, and the orchestration layer that ties them together.
